title: EXTRASTAR 20W Smart RGB Led Floodlight Indoor or Outdoor, 6500K Daylight Flood Light 16 Colours Adjustable with Remote Control, IP65 Waterproof Dimmable Atmosphere Light for Stage Garden (2 Pack)
features: Color Changing&Remote Control: The RGB floodlight enable to change 16 colours in 4 modes(included flash/strobe/smooth/fade). Brightness and mode speed are adjustable. Equipped with user-friendly remote control that allows to control all functions. Enable to provide security, convenience, and energy efficiency at the same time.

Energy Saving: This 20W security lights adopt the most advanced lighting technology, which is a perfect replacement of traditional 160W incandescent bulbs. Brightness up to 1600 lumen and perfectly to light up a very large area like your entire backyard and whole garden.

IP65 Outdoor Waterproof: This outdoor lights built with solid aluminium alloy which is impact resistant, anti-fall and scratch resistant. Waterproof level of IP65 make it possible to protect against moisture and dust, durable and reliable. Work properly no matter in rain, snow, heat or cold environment. Reliable in outdoor lighting applications.

Widely Application: Thanks to its high brightness, the floodlight is perfect to be used for both residential and commercial. With 360 degree bracket adjustable angle, can be installed on the ceiling, wall mounted or placed on the ground. Ideal to illuminate your garage, garden, hallway, backyard, parking lot, warehouse and so on.
High Quality Service: Your satisfaction is priored for us. Any question about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description EXTRASTAR 20W LED Flood Light, 16 Colors Adjustable with Remote Control, IP65 Dimmable Floodlight for Outdoor Specification of Product Wattage: 2 x 20W Cord Length: 3Gx1.0 mm² 1M/40in extension cable Remote Max distance: 5M (MUST remote on front of the light glass) Size: 16x11.8x2.5cm/pcs Waterproof: IP65 Beam Angle: 180 degrees Working Temperature: -10℃ ～ 40℃ Input Voltage: 220-240V AC Current Frequency: 50Hz Color, Mode and Brightness Adjustable with Remote Controller 16 colors and 4 modes to choose from, brightness adjustable, the LED floodlight is always perfect to fit with every environment, you can diy the effect as you desire. It's easy to operate the brightness, mode and color of the floodlight with the 24- Key remote controller. The MAX remote distance is 5M. Please remote on front of the light glass. The 20W RGB spotlight is dimmable, you can turn it up or down as you like. More flexible to meet your different needs.
